targets.rawSql: SELECT balance AS value FROM forecast_balance_daily WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = '$forecast_variant' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND ts::date = (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')::date LIMIT 1

SELECT balance AS value FROM forecast_balance_daily WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = '$forecast_variant' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND ts::date = (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '24 months' - INTERVAL '1 day')::date LIMIT 1

SELECT ts AS time, balance AS value FROM forecast_balance_daily WHERE account_id = '$account_id' AND computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = '$forecast_variant' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

options.content:
**ML forecast status — operator guidance**

The baseline DEC-0007 forecast remains authoritative when the ML overlay is unavailable. Match your deployment to one of these scenarios:

**1. ML not configured** — set `FORECAST_ML_ENABLED=true` and `STATS_FORECAST_URL` per the **US-0013** operator guide (`docs/user-guides/US-0013.md`). Rebuild the external profile and run Full Firefly sync + forecast recompute.

**2. ML configured but sidecar unreachable** — `FORECAST_ML_ENABLED=true` is set but the StatsForecast sidecar is not healthy. Start the **`stats-forecast`** service with the DEC-0076 three-service external compose alongside **`flow-finance-ai`** and **`grafana`**, then re-run Full sync + forecast recompute.

targets.rawSql: SELECT value_eur AS value FROM forecast_portfolio_weekly WHERE computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'ml_enhanced' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND ts::date >= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '3 months')::date ORDER BY ts LIMIT 1

SELECT value_eur AS value FROM forecast_portfolio_weekly WHERE computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'ml_enhanced' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND ts::date >= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '6 months')::date ORDER BY ts LIMIT 1

SELECT value_eur AS value FROM forecast_portfolio_weekly WHERE computation_id = (SELECT id FROM forecast_computations WHERE status = 'success' AND model_kind = 'ml_enhanced' ORDER BY computed_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND ts::date >= (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '12 months')::date ORDER BY ts LIMIT 1

SELECT prs.score AS value FROM plan_risk_scores prs JOIN plan_computations pc ON pc.id = prs.plan_computation_id JOIN plan_versions v ON v.id = pc.version_id JOIN plans p ON p.id = v.plan_id WHERE p.is_active = true AND v.is_latest = true ORDER BY prs.computed_at DESC LIMIT 1

description: Forecast horizons with optional ML variant ($forecast_variant). ML panels empty when no ml_enhanced computation.

list.name: account_id
list.query: SELECT a.firefly_id AS __value, a.name AS __text FROM accounts a WHERE a.type = 'asset' ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE(a.balance, 0)) DESC, a.name ASC

title: Forecast Horizons
